jobs.name: Autobiography Synthesis
jobs.desc: Synthesises personal narrative prose from all memory layers (6h cycle).

jobs.name: Frontal Cortex
jobs.desc: Core reasoning engine; orchestrates all response modes.

jobs.name: Act Mode
jobs.desc: Plans and executes multi-step tool actions. Up to 7 iterations per invocation.

jobs.name: Plan Decomposition
jobs.desc: Decomposes task goals into executable step DAGs for long-horizon planning.

jobs.name: Respond Mode
jobs.desc: Primary conversational voice of Chalie in normal conversation.

jobs.name: Cognitive Drift (DMN)
jobs.desc: Generates spontaneous thoughts during idle windows (Default Mode Network).

jobs.name: Episodic Memory
jobs.desc: Synthesises sessions into episodic narratives for long-term recall.

jobs.name: Clarify Mode
jobs.desc: Asks clarifying questions when user intent is ambiguous.

jobs.name: Proactive Mode
jobs.desc: Translates spontaneous thoughts into outreach messages.

jobs.name: Mode Reflection
jobs.desc: Peer-reviews routing decisions during idle time (nightly batch).

jobs.name: Semantic Memory
jobs.desc: Extracts concepts and relationships to build the knowledge graph.

jobs.name: Cognitive Triage
jobs.desc: Routes user input to optimal cognitive branch (RESPOND/CLARIFY/ACT).

jobs.name: Experience Assimilation
jobs.desc: Evaluates tool outputs for novel knowledge worth storing.

jobs.name: Fact Store
jobs.desc: Extracts and stores atomic facts from exchanges. Runs async.

jobs.name: Ambient Tool Query
jobs.desc: Generates search queries for proactive tool use triggered by cognitive drift.

jobs.name: Reflexive Mode
jobs.desc: Fast reflexive responses for simple, self-contained queries via cognitive reflex path.

jobs.name: Scheduled Tool Mode
jobs.desc: Generates responses after scheduled tool/reminder execution.

jobs.name: Trait Extraction
jobs.desc: Extracts user traits from messages via lightweight LLM call. Async, non-blocking.

jobs.name: Moment Enrichment
jobs.desc: Generates titles and summaries for pinned moments.

jobs.name: Document Synthesis
jobs.desc: Generates summaries for uploaded documents during processing.

jobs.name: Document Classification
jobs.desc: Classifies documents into categories, projects, and dates for automatic organisation.

jobs.name: Document OCR
jobs.desc: Extracts text from image-only PDFs and scanned documents via vision LLM.
